scenes.narration: GATE 2026 mein Operating Systems ke 8-10 marks pakke. Padh lo abhi.
Without understanding Operating Systems, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Operating Systems like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Operating Systems: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Operating Systems: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Operating Systems to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Operating Systems solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
